text: Machine learning models can degrade significantly by redundant and irrelevant features of large datasets. In this paper, a hybrid feature selection method known as IGRF-RFE has been proposed for multi-class network anomalies classification. A multilayer perceptron (MLP) network is used as a classifier. The IGRF-RFE exploits the advantages of both filter and wrapper methods. The filter method is faster than the wrapper method. On the other hand, the wrapper method always provides better accuracy than the filter method. The filter method - IGRF is employed for quick feature reduction. The reduced features are then evaluated by the wrapper method - RFE. Experimental results justify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
